purpose: Strategic transaction-centric rebuild of the public /platform-v7 homepage, including industrial positioning, responsive typography, unified header controls and capability-led RU/EN/ZH copy, without changing production authority or deployment topology.

requiredBoundaries: WCAG serious and critical violations equal zero
participant perspective does not grant access or change permissions
public form sends no personal data
root no-JavaScript fallback exposes no personal-data fields
form-open analytics is separate from validated request submission
public capability copy contains no development-stage or maturity-status language
external-system descriptions communicate function without claiming verified connectivity
public authority route emits title description canonical hreflang and crawlability metadata
root metadata injection preserves service worker recovery and analytics bootstrap scripts byte-for-byte
Lighthouse evidence is collected from a local production build and is not represented as live VPS evidence
Lighthouse CLI version is pinned and reports are uploaded only as private GitHub Actions artifacts

constraints: No Netlify or Vercel production dependency
No real transaction authority in the public scenario
No claim that bank, FGIS, EDI or another external system is connected without verified runtime evidence
RU, EN and ZH content remain complete
No personal data persistence before a verified server endpoint is accepted
